gist.headline: Watering the Apps
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, checking on all the community apps in the greenhouse and updating their metrics.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community application metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory up-to-date with the latest health and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: A robot and the bee mascot tending to a digital greenhouse, representing the automated health checks and metrics updates for community apps.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The tiny bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky retro sprites.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The tiny bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky retro sprites.
